statement: Import purpose — Import supports offline updates, JSON backup recovery, and controlled structure restoration. — JSON import parser, validation, reconciliation preview, local backup
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User can recover or apply offline work safely.
